message:
test(survival): add 22 behavioral property tests for RestartScheduler (wa-1igc)

Adds proptest behavioral invariant coverage for score_components (8 tests),
recommend (11 tests), and ActivityProfile (3 tests). Tests verify monotonicity,
unit-range clamping, product invariant, mode filtering, cooldown, horizon,
EWMA convergence, and hour independence.

Note: verification blocked by 65 pre-existing Cx-migration errors in other
modules (runtime.rs, storage.rs, wezterm.rs) — survival.rs itself compiles
cleanly, all type/method references validated against source.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
